name: dob-prompt-buddy
description: Prompt-coaching skill for tightening crypto research prompts before you send them to an agent.

interface.shortDescription: Prompt-coaching skill for tightening crypto research prompts before you send them to an agent.
interface.longDescription: Reusable crypto prompt-coaching skill with before-send checklists, weak-to-strong rewrites, and workflow-specific checks for token DD, wallet review, and yield scans.
defaultPrompt: Use DOB Prompt Buddy for this task.
